questions.question: What was the first full-length Disney animated feature film?
options: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
questions.explanation: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs was released in 1937.

questions.question: Which Pixar film features the emotion characters Joy, Sadness, and Anger?
questions.explanation: Inside Out (2015) explores the emotions inside a young girl's mind.

questions.question: What is the highest-grossing animated film of all time?
questions.explanation: Inside Out 2 (2024) became the highest-grossing animated film.

questions.question: Which Studio Ghibli film won the Academy Award for Best Animated Feature?
questions.explanation: Spirited Away won the Oscar for Best Animated Feature in 2003.

questions.question: What is the name of the young clownfish who gets captured by divers in a popular Pixar film?
questions.explanation: Nemo is the young clownfish who gets captured by divers.

questions.question: Which anime series features a boy who wants to become King of the Pirates?
questions.explanation: One Piece follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to become King of the Pirates.

questions.question: In 'Toy Story', what is the name of Woody's astronaut rival?
questions.explanation: Buzz Lightyear is the space ranger action figure.

questions.question: Who voiced the Genie in the original 'Aladdin'?
questions.explanation: Robin Williams voiced the Genie in the 1992 animated film.

questions.question: What was the first Pixar feature film?
questions.explanation: Toy Story (1995) was Pixar's first feature and the first fully CGI animated film.

questions.question: In 'Frozen', what is Elsa's power?
questions.explanation: Elsa has the magical ability to create and control ice and snow.

questions.question: Which anime is set in a world where people have superpowers called 'Quirks'?
questions.explanation: My Hero Academia is set in a world where 80% of people have Quirks.

questions.question: What animal is Simba in the classic Disney film about an African savanna prince?
questions.explanation: Simba is a lion and the main character of The Lion King.

questions.question: Which animated film features a rat who dreams of becoming a chef in Paris?
questions.explanation: Ratatouille follows Remy the rat pursuing his culinary dreams.

questions.question: What is the name of the dragon in 'How to Train Your Dragon'?
questions.explanation: Toothless is the Night Fury dragon befriended by Hiccup.

questions.question: Which Disney princess is based on a real historical figure?
questions.explanation: Pocahontas was a real Native American woman from the 17th century.
